ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vtk_classes" (
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each VTK class */,
  "vtk_class_name" TEXT /* Name of the VTK class */,
  "vtk_class_description" TEXT /* Description of the VTK class */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the VTK class belongs to */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the VTK class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the VTK class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the VTK class */,
  "deprecated" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the class is deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vtk_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vtk_classes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VTK class the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, string) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter the value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example */,
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VTK class the example belongs to */,
  "example_code" TEXT /* Code example for the VTK class */,
  "example_description" TEXT /* Description of the usage example */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the example was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the example */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_examples_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VTK class */,
  "related_vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related VTK class */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., inheritance, composition) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_related_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("related_vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last login of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VTK class being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the VTK class */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the VTK class was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the class */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VTK class being revised */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the revision */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "revision_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the revision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the revision was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the revision */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VTK class being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the comment */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VTK class being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was made */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the rating was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "vtk_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the VTK class being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_vtk_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("vtk_class_id") REFERENCES vtk_classes ("vtk_class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tag_aliases" (
  "alias_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alias */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag being aliased */,
  "alias_name" TEXT /* Name of the alias */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the alias was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the alias */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alias_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tag_aliases_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)
